facebook.caption:
640 reviews. 4.4 stars. And most tourists walk right past Nhà Xưa 68.

This local restaurant on 68 Lý Thường Kiệt is what Phu Quoc dining actually looks like away from the resort strip. Real food, real crowd, real atmosphere.

If your Phu Quoc itinerary is all beachfront menus, you're missing half the island.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
